name: Serendipity
overview: Jian Mingshu, the daughter of the Jian family, loses her memory after a fall and is saved by her beloved, Lu Shang. They travel to the capital for their studies, where Jian Mingshu uncovers clues about her identity. With Lu Shang's silent support, their bond deepens as they face challenges together, leading to a lasting relationship.

trailers.title: 「榜上佳婿」預告：王子奇盧昱曉領銜主演，佳緣待“婿”！到底誰才是那如意郎君！ | WeTV
